title: First Project Announcement: Autonomous Drone
excerpt: We're thrilled to announce our first official project: developing an autonomous drone for campus mapping!
content:
After careful consideration and voting among our members, we're excited to announce our first official project: an autonomous drone designed for mapping the DTU campus.

This project will involve:

- Designing and building a custom drone platform
- Implementing computer vision algorithms for obstacle detection
- Creating mapping software that generates 3D models of campus buildings
- Developing autonomous navigation capabilities

Teams are now forming for various aspects of the project. Whether you're interested in hardware, software, or system integration, there's a role for you!

Join us at our next meeting on May 12th to learn more and sign up for a team.
